dict.string: iso.me uses motion data to detect movement and notify you so you can choose whether to start recording your trip.
iso.me reads workout data to automatically start recording your trip when you begin an exercise session on your Apple Watch or in the Health app.
iso.me does not write any data to Health. This entitlement is required by the platform but is unused.
iso.me needs always-on location access to automatically record the places you visit throughout the day, even when the app is in the background. This enables visit detection and travel tracking.
iso.me needs location access to show your current location and record visits when the app is open.
